response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's essential to be aware of the different types of fake content, such as bots, propaganda, and disinformation. Once you are aware of these types of content, you can take steps to identify and avoid them. Here are some tips to help you manage and deal with fake content on social media: 1. Be cautious of sensational headlines or posts that seem too good (or bad) to be true. 2. Verify the authenticity of news and information before sharing it. 3. Use fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false information. 4. Follow reputable sources and journalists on social media to get accurate information. 5. Be mindful of your own biases and try to seek out diverse perspectives. By being informed and proactive, you can better manage and deal with fake content on social media."
